eClinicalWorks synthetic progress note
55M here for prevention review. BP: 132/82, on antihypertensive therapy.
Lipid panel non-fasting: Total cholesterol 205, LDL 132, HDL 48, TG 180, ApoB 110, Lp(a) 80 nmol/L.
A1c 7.1 with diabetes. BMI 31. eGFR 55, creatinine 1.15, urine albumin creatinine ratio 45.
CAC 350. Smoking: no. Father MI age 49. hsCRP 2.4. Denies ASCVD.
No lipid lowering therapy.
